task: Browse the \"Text Effect\" section and note the file formats (PNG) offered in the first 10 assets.\nwebsite: https://pngtree.com
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed the task. It started by navigating to the Pngtree website and then located the 'Text Effect' section. Although it initially clicked a button that didn't navigate, it quickly corrected its approach by clicking the 'Explore' link, which led to the dedicated 'Text Effect' listing page. The agent encountered a persistent sign-up modal but effectively closed it after a couple of attempts. A key strength was the agent's ability to identify and extract the file format information (PNG, Vector, PSD) directly from the HTML data attributes of the asset items, rather than relying solely on visible text or needing to click into each individual asset. The final output is well-formatted, accurate, and provides all the requested information for the first 10 assets.
